title: A Framework for Addressing Code Quality Challenges in Generative AI Adoption for Software Engineering Teams
data:
VP Gandla - 2026
Background. Generative AI coding tools have rapidly become embedded in 
theindustrial software development, with documented quality risks across 
correctness, security, maintainability, and consistency. Despite these risks, software 
engineeringteams currently lack integrated, evidence-based guidance for managing 
the qualityof AI-generated code at the team level. Objectives. This thesis develops 
and validates a Code Quality Management Frame-work that supports software
